heroHeadline: From Tahuantinsuyo to the Republic: 588 Years of Peruvian History
heroSubtitle: Tracking the arc from Pachacuti's Inca Empire (1438) through conquest, independence, insurgency, and contemporary political crisis under President Boluarte.
footerNote: Data sourced from official reports, CVR Truth and Reconciliation Commission, major outlets, and institutional analyses.
